content.en:
"I'll help you see how your injuries are?"

Ye Tian said.

"Thank you very much!" Mitian Jizun was not polite, he really wanted to recover from his injuries, it was difficult to do it on his own, he could only rely on a powerful existence like Ye Tian.

Immediately.

Ye Tian examined the injuries of the Mitian Extreme Venerable, and the ultimate will probed into his body.

And in the perception of the Heavenly Extreme Venerable, an ultimate will far beyond his imagination came, this bone ultimate will is too terrifying, and his ultimate will is like a drop of water and a big river in front of this ultimate will, the gap is too big.

And at this moment, Ye Tian was carefully checking.

"Your injuries are a little strange, it seems to be a strange energy! not the power of the Ultimate Realm Lord himself, but more like an injury caused by a weapon. Ye Tian said.

"Yes, Wanfa Jizun, I was hit by a mirror of the Guantian Jizun, so I still can't recover from my injuries. Mi Tian Ji Zun said.

"I'll help you get rid of this energy!"

Ye Tian made a move, he reached out and grabbed it, and 497 directly took out the indelible special energy in the body of the Mitian Extreme Venerable, and then gently pinched it, directly crushing this energy and turning it into ashes.

Without this energy, Mitian Jizun himself would be able to recover from his injuries.

"Thank you Wanfa Jizun!"

Mi Tian Ji Zun thanked.

"It's just a small thing. Ye Tian smiled.

The Heavenly Supreme Venerable asked curiously, "Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerables, have you broken through to the Ultimate Supreme Venerable?"

"No, I just left the Ultimate Land with the help of an Ultimate Master. If you want to become the ultimate supreme, it's not that easy!" Ye Tiandao.

"Ten Thousand Laws Extreme, what does the ultimate place look like?"

Mi Tian Ji Zun asked curiously.

Ye Tian introduced: "The energy of the Ultimate Land is very thin, and it may be different from the heaven and earth you imagine. If we enter there, the energy in our body will continue to flow, and if we want to stabilize the energy in our body, we must use the ultimate hedron. And if the living soul falls, it will be absorbed by the ultimate place. And in order to maintain order and stability, the Ultimate Land will launch an ultimate catastrophe after a long period of time. In the Ultimate Tribulation, except for the Ultimate Extremity, other living beings may fall. Even if it is an Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Master, it is possible to fall and die. "

"Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord, what realm is this?"

Mi Tian Ji Venerable asked.

Ye Tian introduced: "In the ultimate land, under the ultimate realm master, it is called the servant level, and the ultimate realm master is called the soldier level. After practicing the ultimate body, it is a heroic level. And you are a hero. If you comprehend the ultimate rule, it is the ancient level. Comprehend the ultimate rules to a strong enough realm, and then cultivate an ultimate body to the perfection realm, you can break through to the eternal level. And if the Eternal Level wants to break through to become the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, it will be too difficult. "

Ye Tian didn't say how to break through to the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, and the Mitian Supreme Venerable didn't ask, because it was indeed too far away from him, and it was no good to ask.

"Hao level, there are ancient level, eternal level, and ultimate extreme honor on it, my strength is really weak in the ultimate place. "

Mi Tian Ji Zun Dao.

Immediately, Ye Tian said a lot of things about the Ultimate Land, which made Mitian Jizun even more afraid to go to the Ultimate Land.

In fact, Ye Tian did not recommend that Mitian Extreme Venerable them go to the ultimate land, if they didn't have a special chance or bad luck, it would be too difficult to rise in the ultimate land, and there was a high probability that they would fall and die.

Instead of that, you might as well stay in the Sea of Dimensions!

After that, Ye (agaj) Tian chatted with Mitian Jizun for a long time before leaving.

......

Guantian Holy Mountain.

On a majestic throne, a silver-clothed young man sat on it, and a group of Ultimate Realm Lords stood below.

"Holy Lord, the father of the Terran Ten Thousand Stars Extreme Venerable, the Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable, has returned from the Ultimate Land!"

An Ultimate Realm Lord said.

"Ten Thousand Laws are Extremely Venerable!"

The Heavenly Viewing Extreme Venerable had never seen this Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable, when he was born, this Ten Thousand Laws Supreme Venerable had already entered the ultimate place, and he only knew that this Ten Thousand Laws Supreme Venerable was almost invincible in the Dimensional Sea at the beginning, but he was still a heroic level.

"Coming out of the Ultimate Land requires the strength of the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, could it be that he has become the Ultimate Extreme Venerable?

Guantian Extreme Venerable did not believe that Ye Tian had broken through to be the ultimate Extreme Venerable.

At this time, an Ultimate Realm Lord asked, "Holy Lord, when the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable returns, do we have any indication for looking at the Heavenly Sacred Mountain?"

"You don't have to do anything, just act like you don't know. "

Guantian Jizun said.

"Yes!"

Many Ultimate Realm Masters responded to the Dao.

Immediately, the heaven-watching pole let them leave.

In the empty hall, the Guantian Extreme Venerable suddenly said to himself: "Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable, do you think this Ten Thousand Laws Supreme Venerable has broken through to the ultimate Supreme Venerable?"

"Nope!"

A voice rang out.

"If that Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable breaks through to the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, the entire Dimensional Sea will undergo a transformation, making the entire Dimensional Sea rise to a higher level. At the beginning, when I came out of the Ultimate Land, everyone thought that I had become the Ultimate Extreme, and I didn't explain it. Actually, I'm one step away from the ultimate extreme. I thought I would break through to the ultimate supreme, but I failed, and if I hadn't obtained a special treasure that preserved my soul will, I would have died. But for countless years, I still didn't dare to take the lead, I could only hide on this treasure, otherwise, it would be bad to be wiped out by heaven and earth. "

"But now, I've figured out a way to avoid heaven and earth, and it won't be long before I can be reborn. "

Zhangtian Jizun said.

And if these words were to be spread, they would definitely shock the entire Dimensional Sea.

The Ultimate Extreme Venerable who had broken through in the mouth of the Heavenly Extreme Venerable, the Heavenly Extreme Venerable, was not really the Ultimate Supreme Venerable.

And Ye Tian didn't know, after all, he didn't know the names of those Ultimate Extreme Venerables, he only knew a Doomsday Extreme Venerable, otherwise, he should know that the Heavenly Supreme Venerable was not one of those Ultimate Supreme Venerables.
